plugin_desc: Meinberg LANTIME time-server SNMP collection for appliances under Meinberg PEN 5597. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The public LANTIME MIB confirms NTP and PTP service objects, but stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars with conservative status semantics are not proven in the current MIB facts, so service indicators are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
